agents.name: Planner
agents.lastMessage: Introducing a bulky aromatic residue at position 5 and a negatively charged resi

report.hypothesis: Introducing a bulky aromatic residue at position 5 and a negatively charged residue at position 6 will enhance SSTR2-specific interactions while disrupting off-target (SSTR3/SSTR5) electrostatic complementarity, thereby increasing the selectivity margin.

agents.name: Critic
agents.lastMessage: The current designs are achieving strong SSTR2 binding and selectivity (Δmargin

report.hypothesis: The current designs are achieving strong SSTR2 binding and selectivity (Δmargin > 0), but structural and sequence failures suggest that the design space is still not fully optimized. Focusing on key non-pharmacophore positions and tightening clash filtering should improve robustness and convergence.

proposed_changes.rationale: To explicitly focus on non-pharmacophore positions where off-target contacts (especially with SSTR3/SSTR5) are likely occurring, while preserving the critical FWKT(7-10) and Cys3/Cys14 pharmacophore.
Tighter clash filtering will improve structural quality and reduce false positives that pass QC but have poor geometry or stability.
